response.overview: Path 99 is an immersive, experimental feature documentary that crafts a stunning portrait of the Australian atmosphere using "ruined" satellite data [nziff.co.nz]. Created from years of weather imagery discarded by climate scientists because of heavy cloud cover, the film blends colossal storm fronts, shifting cloudscapes, and desert droughts into a hypnotic visual experience paired with a powerful ambient electronic soundtrack.
response.tagline: ...showing us how, now more than ever, it is crucial that we all have our heads in the clouds.
response.title: Path 99
